tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables available in the connected PostgreSQL database

tools.name: list_extensions
tools.description: List all installed PostgreSQL extensions. May return empty if the gateway does not expose extension metadata.

tools.name: list_migrations
tools.description: List applied database migrations

tools.name: apply_migration
tools.description: Apply a SQL migration against the connected database. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: execute_sql
tools.description: Execute a raw SQL query against the connected database. Write operations are blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Retrieve recent database or application logs

tools.name: get_columns_of_table
tools.description: Describe columns for a table using Athena's schema API

tools.name: list_table_metadata
tools.description: Return the full metadata for a table: schema name, table name, and each column's name, type, default value, and nullable flag

tools.name: list_schemas
tools.description: List database schemas visible to the current Athena client

tools.name: list_views
tools.description: List visible views (and optionally materialized views). Uses Athena schema API.

tools.name: list_foreign_keys
tools.description: List primary keys, foreign keys, and unique constraints for a table. Essential for understanding relationships and correct joins.

tools.name: get_table_sample
tools.description: Sample rows from a table to understand its data shape. Quick alternative to writing SQL.

tools.name: list_indexes
tools.description: List index definitions for a table. Helps with performance and query design.

tools.name: search_columns
tools.description: Find tables and columns by name pattern. Speeds up schema discovery.

tools.name: get_row_by_id
tools.description: Fetch rows by primary key column value. Simplifies the common fetch-by-id use case.

tools.name: list_all_table_metadata
tools.description: Return metadata for all tables in one call: schema, name, columns, types, defaults, nullable. Uses Athena schema API.

tools.name: insert_row
tools.description: Insert a row into a table. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: delete_row
tools.description: Delete a row by primary key (resource_id). Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: update_row
tools.description: Update rows matching a condition. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: get_row_by_eq_column_of_table
tools.description: Fetch rows from a table where `column = value` using Athena's fetch endpoint

tools.name: get_api_root
tools.description: Fetch Athena API root metadata, including the advertised route list.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Run the Athena health check endpoint.

tools.name: get_cluster_health
tools.description: Check Athena mirror reachability, latency, throughput, and version metadata.

tools.name: get_management_capabilities
tools.description: List Athena management API capabilities and required rights for the current client.

tools.name: create_table
tools.description: Create a managed table through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: edit_table
tools.description: Apply safe additive ALTER TABLE operations through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: drop_table
tools.description: Drop a managed table through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: drop_column
tools.description: Drop a managed table column through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: create_index
tools.description: Create an index through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: drop_index
tools.description: Drop an index through Athena's management API. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: run_pipeline
tools.description: Run a config-driven Athena pipeline (source -> transform -> sink).

tools.name: list_available_clients
tools.description: List the MCP server's configured Athena client allowlist and, when available, the remote Athena client catalog response.

tools.name: storage_credentials_list
tools.description: List managed Athena storage credentials using the storage SDK binding.

tools.name: storage_catalog_list
tools.description: List managed Athena storage catalogs.

tools.name: storage_catalog_create
tools.description: Create a managed Athena storage catalog.

tools.name: storage_catalog_update
tools.description: Update a managed Athena storage catalog.

tools.name: storage_catalog_delete
tools.description: Delete a managed Athena storage catalog.

tools.name: storage_file_upload
tools.description: Create an upload URL for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_upload_many
tools.description: Create multiple upload URLs for managed Athena storage files in one call.

tools.name: storage_file_confirm_upload
tools.description: Confirm that a managed Athena storage upload completed and persist any final metadata.

tools.name: storage_file_upload_binary
tools.description: Upload small file content directly through MCP using either base64 or UTF-8 text.

tools.name: storage_file_list
tools.description: List managed Athena storage files.

tools.name: storage_file_search
tools.description: Search managed Athena storage files.

tools.name: storage_file_get
tools.description: Get managed Athena storage file metadata.

tools.name: storage_file_update
tools.description: Update managed Athena storage file metadata.

tools.name: storage_file_update_many
tools.description: Update many managed Athena storage files in one call.

tools.name: storage_file_delete
tools.description: Delete a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_delete_many
tools.description: Delete many managed Athena storage files in one call.

tools.name: storage_file_restore
tools.description: Restore a soft-deleted managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_purge
tools.description: Purge a managed Athena storage file permanently.

tools.name: storage_file_copy
tools.description: Copy a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_url
tools.description: Generate a signed URL for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_public_url
tools.description: Generate the public URL for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_proxy_url
tools.description: Generate the proxy URL for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_proxy
tools.description: Proxy a managed Athena storage file and return response metadata plus text when the proxied content is text-based.

tools.name: storage_file_visibility_update
tools.description: PATCH-style visibility update for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_visibility_set
tools.description: POST-style visibility update for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_visibility_set_many
tools.description: Update visibility for many managed Athena storage files in one call.

tools.name: storage_file_versions
tools.description: List managed Athena storage file versions.

tools.name: storage_file_version_restore
tools.description: Restore a specific managed Athena storage file version.

tools.name: storage_file_version_delete
tools.description: Delete a specific managed Athena storage file version.

tools.name: storage_file_retention_get
tools.description: Read retention settings for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_file_retention_set
tools.description: Set retention settings for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_folder_list
tools.description: List managed Athena storage folders under a prefix.

tools.name: storage_folder_tree
tools.description: Return the managed Athena storage folder tree under a prefix.

tools.name: storage_folder_delete
tools.description: Delete a managed Athena storage folder.

tools.name: storage_folder_move
tools.description: Move a managed Athena storage folder.

tools.name: storage_permission_list
tools.description: List file-level permissions for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_permission_grant
tools.description: Grant a permission for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_permission_revoke
tools.description: Revoke a permission for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_permission_check
tools.description: Check a permission for a managed Athena storage file.

tools.name: storage_object_list
tools.description: List raw S3-compatible objects through Athena storage.

tools.name: storage_object_head
tools.description: Read object metadata with the raw S3-compatible storage binding.

tools.name: storage_object_exists
tools.description: Check whether a raw storage object exists.

tools.name: storage_object_validate
tools.description: Validate a raw storage object checksum or ETag.

tools.name: storage_object_update
tools.description: Update object metadata or state with the raw storage binding.

tools.name: storage_object_copy
tools.description: Copy a raw storage object.

tools.name: storage_object_url
tools.description: Create a signed URL for a raw storage object.

tools.name: storage_object_public_url
tools.description: Create a public URL for a raw storage object.

tools.name: storage_object_delete
tools.description: Delete a raw storage object.

tools.name: storage_object_upload_url
tools.description: Create an upload URL for a raw storage object.

tools.name: storage_object_versions
tools.description: List versions for a raw storage object or prefix.

tools.name: storage_object_version_restore
tools.description: Restore a specific raw storage object version.

tools.name: storage_object_version_delete
tools.description: Delete a specific raw storage object version.

tools.name: storage_object_post_policy
tools.description: Create a signed POST policy for a raw storage object upload.

tools.name: storage_object_folder_create
tools.description: Create a folder in the raw S3-compatible object namespace.

tools.name: storage_object_folder_delete
tools.description: Delete a folder in the raw S3-compatible object namespace.

tools.name: storage_object_folder_rename
tools.description: Rename a folder in the raw S3-compatible object namespace.

tools.name: storage_bucket_list
tools.description: List buckets visible to the Athena storage binding.

tools.name: storage_bucket_create
tools.description: Create a bucket through the Athena storage binding.

tools.name: storage_bucket_delete
tools.description: Delete a bucket through the Athena storage binding.

tools.name: storage_bucket_cors_get
tools.description: Read bucket CORS configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_cors_set
tools.description: Set bucket CORS configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_cors_delete
tools.description: Delete bucket CORS configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_lifecycle_get
tools.description: Read bucket lifecycle configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_lifecycle_set
tools.description: Set bucket lifecycle configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_lifecycle_delete
tools.description: Delete bucket lifecycle configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_policy_get
tools.description: Read bucket policy configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_policy_set
tools.description: Set bucket policy configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_policy_delete
tools.description: Delete bucket policy configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_public_access_get
tools.description: Read bucket public-access block configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_public_access_set
tools.description: Set bucket public-access block configuration.

tools.name: storage_bucket_public_access_delete
tools.description: Delete bucket public-access block configuration.

tools.name: storage_multipart_create
tools.description: Create a multipart upload session for a managed storage file.

tools.name: storage_multipart_sign_part
tools.description: Sign a multipart upload part for a managed storage file.

tools.name: storage_multipart_complete
tools.description: Complete a multipart upload for a managed storage file.

tools.name: storage_multipart_abort
tools.description: Abort a multipart upload for a managed storage file.

tools.name: storage_multipart_list_parts
tools.description: List parts for a multipart upload on a managed storage file.

tools.name: storage_audit_list
tools.description: List storage audit events.

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. List Athena API keys using the admin API.

tools.name: create_api_key
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Create an Athena API key. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: update_api_key
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Update an existing Athena API key. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: delete_api_key
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Delete an Athena API key. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: list_api_key_rights
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. List available Athena API key rights.

tools.name: create_api_key_right
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Create an Athena API key right. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: update_api_key_right
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Update an Athena API key right. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: delete_api_key_right
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Delete an Athena API key right. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: get_api_key_config
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Read the global Athena API key enforcement configuration.

tools.name: update_api_key_config
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Update global Athena API key enforcement. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: list_api_key_clients
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. List per-client Athena API key enforcement overrides.

tools.name: save_api_key_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Create or update a per-client Athena API key enforcement override. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: delete_api_key_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Delete a per-client Athena API key enforcement override. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: list_athena_clients_admin
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. List Athena clients from the database-backed admin catalog.

tools.name: create_athena_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Create an Athena client in the admin catalog. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: update_athena_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Update an Athena client in the admin catalog. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: delete_athena_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Soft-delete an Athena client from the admin catalog. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: freeze_athena_client
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Freeze or unfreeze an Athena client. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: list_client_statistics
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. List aggregated Athena client statistics from gateway logs.

tools.name: refresh_client_statistics
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Rebuild Athena client statistics from gateway logs. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: get_client_statistics
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Inspect per-client Athena statistics and touched tables.

tools.name: toggle_supabase_ssl_enforcement
tools.description: Experimental admin tool. Enable or disable Supabase SSL enforcement for a project. Blocked when read_only mode is enabled.

tools.name: list_router_registry
tools.description: List Athena router registry entries.

tools.name: list_registry_entries
tools.description: List API registry entries from Athena.

tools.name: get_registry_entry
tools.description: Fetch a specific API registry entry by ID.

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Fetch Athena's Prometheus metrics payload.

tools.name: get_embedded_openapi
tools.description: Download Athena's embedded OpenAPI YAML document.

tools.name: get_websocket_info
tools.description: Read Athena's websocket gateway contract metadata.
